name: apipilot-ai
description: APIPilot AI - AI Powered API Development & Testing Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace client" "npm run dev --workspace server"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace client && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace client && npm run lint --workspace server

author: APIPilot AI
